# JWileymisc

An `R` package with general utility and convenience functions. Some of
these are general functions that help using and exploring SEM style
data. Others are more specific. This package has grown out of my own
work, and is often to automate repetitive tasks. See the Vignettes,
listed under the “Articles” menu item for description and examples using
some of the more interesting functions from the package.

## Installation

To get the latest development version, use:

``` r


#install.packages("devtools")

devtools::install_github("JWiley/JWileymisc")
```

To get the version on CRAN:

``` r


install.packages("JWileymisc")
```

# Package index

## All functions

- [`APAStyler()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/APAStyler.md)
  : A generic function for pretty printing in (semi) APA Style
- [`APAStyler(`*`<SEMSummary>`*`)`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/APAStyler.SEMSummary.md)
  : A generic function for pretty printing in (semi) APA Style
- [`APAStyler(`*`<list>`*`)`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/APAStyler.list.md)
  : APAStyler method for lists
- [`APAStyler(`*`<lm>`*`)`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/APAStyler.lm.md)
  : APAStyler method for linear models
- [`APAStyler(`*`<mira>`*`)`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/APAStyler.mira.md)
  : A generic function for pretty printing in (semi) APA Style
- [`APAStyler(`*`<modelTest.lm>`*`)`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/APAStyler.modelTest.lm.md)
  : APAStyler method for model tests from a linear model
- [`APAStyler(`*`<modelTest.vglm>`*`)`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/APAStyler.modelTest.vglm.md)
  : APAStyler method for model tests from a vglm multinomial model
- [`R2()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/R2.md) :
  Calculate R2 Values
- [`SEMSummary()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/SEMSummary.md)
  : Summary Statistics for a SEM Analysis
- [`SEMSummary.fit()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/SEMSummary.fit.md)
  : Summary Statistics for a SEM Analysis
- [`TukeyHSDgg()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/TukeyHSDgg.md)
  : Tukey HSD Plot
- [`VAConverter()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/VAConverter.md)
  : Visual Acuity Converter
- [`show(`*`<VAObject>`*`)`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/VAObject-class.md)
  [`` `[`( ``*`<VAObject>`*`,`*`<ANY>`*`,`*`<ANY>`*`,`*`<ANY>`*`)`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/VAObject-class.md)
  [`print(`*`<VAObject>`*`)`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/VAObject-class.md)
  [`summary(`*`<VAObject>`*`)`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/VAObject-class.md)
  : An S4 class to hold visual acuity data
- [`show(`*`<VASummaryObject>`*`)`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/VASummaryObject-class.md)
  [`plot(`*`<VASummaryObject>`*`,`*`<missing>`*`)`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/VASummaryObject-class.md)
  : An S4 class to hold visual acuity summary data
- [`aces_daily`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/aces_daily.md)
  : Multilevel Daily Data Example
- [`as.na()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/as.na.md) :
  Coerces vectors to missing
- [`cd()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/cd.md) : Change
  directory
- [`compareIVs()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/compareIVs.md)
  : Compares the effects of various independent variables on dependent
  variables
- [`saveRDSfst()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/compressedrds.md)
  [`readRDSfst()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/compressedrds.md)
  : Save and read RDS functions for using multithreaded “ZSTD” or “LZ4”
  compression
- [`cor2cov()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/cor2cov.md)
  : Convert a correlation matrix and standard deviations to a covariance
  matrix
- [`corOK()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/corOK.md) :
  Return a non-missing correlation matrix
- [`corplot()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/corplot.md)
  : Heatmap of a Correlation Matrix
- [`cramerV()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/cramerV.md)
  : Calculate Phi or Cramer's V effect size
- [`density_inversion()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/density_inversion.md)
  : KDE-based Inverse CDF Sampling for Synthetic Data
- [`diffCircular()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/diffCircular.md)
  : Calculate the Circular Difference
- [`.fround()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/dot-fround.md)
  : Function to round and format a number
- [`.quantilePercentiles()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/dot-quantilePercentiles.md)
  : Internal Function to Calculate Quantiles
- [`egltable()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/egltable.md)
  : Function makes nice tables
- [`empirical_pvalue()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/empirical_pvalue.md)
  : Calculates an empirical p-value based on the data
- [`findSigRegions()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/findSigRegions.md)
  : Function to find significant regions from an interaction
- [`formatHtest()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/formatHtest.md)
  : Function to format the reuslts of a hypothesis test as text
- [`formatMedIQR()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/formatMedIQR.md)
  : Function to format the median and IQR of a variable
- [`formatPval()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/formatPval.md)
  : Function to simplify formatting p-values for easy viewing /
  publication
- [`geom_tufterange()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/geom_tufterange.md)
  : Tufte Range
- [`gglikert()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/gglikert.md)
  : Creates a plot for likert scale
- [`hashDataset()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/hashDataset.md)
  : Create a character vector or file hash of a dataset and each
  variable
- [`intSigRegGraph()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/intSigRegGraph.md)
  : Function to find significant regions from an interaction
- [`is.naz()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/is.naz.md) :
  Is a variable missing, non finite or zero length character?
- [`lagk()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/lagk.md) :
  Create a lagged variable
- [`lm2()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/lm2.md) :
  Modified lm() to use a specified design matrix
- [`meanCircular()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/meanCircular.md)
  : Calculate a Circular Mean
- [`modelCompare()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/modelCompare.md)
  [`as.modelCompare()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/modelCompare.md)
  [`is.modelCompare()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/modelCompare.md)
  : Compare Two Models
- [`modelDiagnostics()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/modelDiagnostics.md)
  [`as.modelDiagnostics()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/modelDiagnostics.md)
  [`is.modelDiagnostics()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/modelDiagnostics.md)
  : Model Diagnostics Functions
- [`modelPerformance()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/modelPerformance.md)
  [`as.modelPerformance()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/modelPerformance.md)
  [`is.modelPerformance()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/modelPerformance.md)
  : Return Indices of Model Performance
- [`modelTest()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/modelTest.md)
  [`is.modelTest()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/modelTest.md)
  [`as.modelTest()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/modelTest.md)
  : Detailed Tests on Models
- [`moments()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/moments.md)
  : Estimate the first and second moments
- [`naz.omit()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/naz.omit.md)
  : Missing and Zero Character Omit
- [`param_summary()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/param_summary.md)
  : Calculates summaries for a parameter
- [`param_summary_format()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/param_summary_format.md)
  : Format a data frame of summary statistics
- [`plot(`*`<SEMSummary>`*`)`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/plot.SEMSummary.md)
  : Plots SEMSummary object
- [`plot(`*`<SEMSummary.list>`*`)`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/plot.SEMSummary.list.md)
  : Plots SEMSummary.list object
- [`plot(`*`<modelDiagnostics.lm>`*`)`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/plot.modelDiagnostics.lm.md)
  : Plot Diagnostics for an lm model
- [`plot(`*`<residualDiagnostics>`*`)`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/plot.residualDiagnostics.md)
  : Plot Residual Diagnostics Default Method
- [`plot(`*`<testDistribution>`*`)`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/plot.testDistribution.md)
  : Plot method for testDistribution objects
- [`residualDiagnostics()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/residualDiagnostics.md)
  [`as.residualDiagnostics()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/residualDiagnostics.md)
  [`is.residualDiagnostics()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/residualDiagnostics.md)
  : Residual Diagnostics Functions
- [`roundedfivenum()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/roundedfivenum.md)
  : Calculate a rounded five number summary
- [`smd()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/smd.md) :
  Calculate Standardized Mean Difference (SMD)
- [`star()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/star.md) :
  Function to simplify converting p-values to asterisks
- [`testDistribution()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/testDistribution.md)
  [`as.testDistribution()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/testDistribution.md)
  [`is.testDistribution()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/testDistribution.md)
  : Test the distribution of a variable against a specific distribution
- [`theme_tufte()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/theme_tufte.md)
  : Tufte Inspired Theme
- [`timeshift()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/timeshift.md)
  : Shift a time variable to have a new center (zero point)
- [`winsorizor()`](https://joshuawiley.com/JWileymisc/reference/winsorizor.md)
  : Winsorize at specified percentiles
